title: Citizen developers now have their own Wingman
optimized_headline: Citizen Developers Gain an Innovative New Tool: Meet Their Wingman
raw_excerpt:
A vibe-coding application creation company, Emergent, has released Wingman, an autonomous agent that can address and take control of the applications used to manage daily tasks. The company’s press release states: “The best technology should be accessible to everyone”, and cites the difficulty that users without a technical background have in creating software applications. It […]
The post Citizen
raw_body:
A vibe-coding application creation company, Emergent, has released Wingman, an autonomous agent that can address and take control of the applications used to manage daily tasks. The company’s press release states: “The best technology should be accessible to everyone”, and cites the difficulty that users without a technical background have in creating software applications. It […]
The post Citizen developers now have their own Wingman appeared first on AI News.
speedrun: Emergent has launched Wingman, an autonomous agent designed to help users manage applications for daily tasks. This tool aims to make technology more accessible, especially for those without a technical background. By addressing the challenges faced by citizen developers, Wingman could significantly streamline the application creation process. Its release is timely as more people seek user-friendly solutions in an increasingly digital world.
why_it_matters: Citizen developers can now create and manage applications more easily, reducing reliance on technical experts. This could empower more individuals to innovate.
The launch of Wingman signals a shift towards more inclusive technology, making it easier for non-experts to participate in software development and management.

lenses.eli12: Emergent's Wingman acts like a helpful assistant for anyone wanting to create apps without needing coding skills. Imagine having a friend who knows all the tech stuff and can set things up for you. This matters because it opens doors for everyday people to create and manage their own digital tools.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, Wingman represents a way to meet the growing demand for user-friendly software solutions. It addresses a clear need for non-technical users to manage applications efficiently, potentially reducing development costs. This could lead to faster product iterations and a broader user base.
lenses.engineer: Wingman is an autonomous agent that simplifies application management for users lacking technical expertise. It leverages advanced algorithms to interact with various software tools effectively. While the specifics of its underlying models weren't detailed, its focus on accessibility could reshape how citizen developers approach app creation.
